title: Resume
description: This is a stubbed description for the resume page.

workExperience.description: Manage and operate a tree service business, providing tree care and maintenance services to residential and commercial clients.
achievements: Founded and grew a small business startup, boosting customer base by 100% while managing operations and project success.
Implemented efficient scheduling and resource management strategies, reducing operational costs by 15% and improving service delivery.
Successfully completed over 500 tree care projects, maintaining a 95% customer satisfaction rate through quality service and effective communication.
Cultivated strong client relationships, leading to a 30% increase in repeat business through transparent communication and trust-building.
Built and mainrtained a strong online presence, increasing brand visibility and attracting new customers.
requirements: Daily operations include client consultations, project management, and team leadership.
Organize and manage a team of 3 employees, ensuring efficient workflow and high-quality service delivery.
Strong analytical skills and ability to identify market opportunities.
Office management and organizational skills, including scheduling, invoicing, and customer relationship management.
Physical fitness and ability to perform manual labor, including climbing and working at heights.

workExperience.description: Working on various projects related to web development and cloud services.
achievements: Contributed to the development of a scalable web application, improving performance by 30% and enhancing user experience.
Built and maintained a homelab infrastructure, optimizing resource utilization.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines, reducing deployment time by 50% and increasing deployment frequency.
Successfully developed and deployed microservices, improving system modularity and scalability.
requirements: Proficient in JavaScript, React, Node.js, and cloud technologies.
Experience with agile development methodologies and version control systems.
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a collaborative team environment.

workExperience.description: Focused on building responsive and user-friendly web interfaces.
achievements: Developed and maintained a customer-facing web application, increasing user engagement by 25%.
Collaborated with designers and backend developers to implement new features and improve existing ones.
Optimized frontend performance, reducing load times by 20% and enhancing overall user experience.
requirements: Proficient in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frontend frameworks.
Experience with responsive design and cross-browser compatibility.
Strong attention to detail and ability to translate design mockups into functional web interfaces.

education.description: Studied various aspects of computer science, including algorithms, data structures, and software engineering.
